translations.landing.product.comparison.title: Flyto2 vs Other
translations.landing.product.cta.description: Get started for free. No credit card required. Works offline.
translations.landing.product.cta.title: Ready to automate with confidence?
translations.landing.product.hero.description: Most automation tools run everything without asking. Flyto2 lets you stay in control — pause, check, approve, and continue at every step.
translations.landing.product.hero.title: Automation You Can
translations.landing.product.problem.allOrNothing.des: Most tools run everything at once. If something goes wrong halfway through 1,000 items, you don't find out until the damage is done.
translations.landing.product.problem.cloud.desc: Some data shouldn't leave your computer or your company's network. But most automation tools require an internet connection and store your data somewhere else.
translations.landing.product.problem.cloud.title: Your Data Goes to the Cloud
translations.landing.product.problem.noApproval.desc: Sometimes a person needs to review and approve before the next step runs. Most tools can't pause and wait — they just keep going.
translations.landing.product.problem.noApproval.title: No Way to Pause for Approval
translations.landing.product.problem.subtitle: Most automation tools have a fundamental problem: once you hit "run", you lose control.
translations.landing.product.problem.title: Problems Other Tools
translations.landing.product.problem.validation.desc: When data doesn't look right — wrong format, missing fields — most tools just keep going. You end up with bad results and no idea where it went wrong.
translations.landing.product.problem.validation.title: Bad Data Slips Through
translations.landing.product.solution.approval.desc: Add approval steps anywhere in your workflow. The system pauses and waits for a person to confirm before moving on.
translations.landing.product.solution.approval.title: Human Approval Steps
translations.landing.product.solution.audit.desc: Every step is recorded with screenshots, logs, and timestamps. You can always go back and see exactly what happened.
translations.landing.product.solution.audit.title: Full Record of Every Step
translations.landing.product.solution.builtin.desc: Flyto2 checks the data at every step. If something doesn't look right, it stops immediately and tells you what's wrong — before it causes problems.
translations.landing.product.solution.builtin.title: Built-in Data Checking
translations.landing.product.solution.offline.desc: Flyto2 runs entirely on your computer. No internet needed. Your data never leaves your machine.
translations.landing.product.solution.offline.title: Works 100% Offline
translations.landing.product.solution.pause.desc: Run one item first. Check if it's correct. Then run the rest. You're always in control of when things move forward.
translations.landing.product.solution.pause.title: Pause Anytime
translations.landing.product.solution.rollback.desc: Made a mistake? Go back to the last good point, fix it, and continue from there. No need to start over.
translations.landing.product.solution.rollback.title: Go Back & Continue
translations.landing.product.solution.security.title: Title
translations.landing.product.solution.subtitle: Flyto2 is built so that automation and human judgment work together, not against each other.
translations.landing.product.solution.title: Designed for People Who Need to
translations.landing.product.validation.step1.desc: Before each step runs, Flyto2 checks that the data looks right. If something is missing or wrong, it stops and tells you.
translations.landing.product.validation.step1.title: Check Before Running
translations.landing.product.validation.step2.desc: Data moving between steps must match what's expected. No surprises, no silent failures.
translations.landing.product.validation.step2.title: Keep Data Consistent
translations.landing.product.validation.step3.desc: After each step finishes, the results are checked. If anything looks off, you'll know right away.
translations.landing.product.validation.step3.title: Verify the Results
translations.landing.product.validation.step4.desc: Flyto2 saves progress as it goes. If something fails later, you can go back to the last save point instead of starting over.
translations.landing.product.validation.step4.title: Save Progress Along the Way
translations.landing.product.validation.subtitle: Most automation failures aren't about broken logic — they're about bad data that nobody caught in time.
translations.landing.product.validation.title: Why Checking Data Should Be
